summary: Reaction GIF Feature - Single-screen flow with viral style packs. All 19 backend pytest tests passed. Frontend UI verified: single-screen layout (no wizard), 9 reactions, 6 style packs (Classic, Meme, Pixar, Anime, Desi, Corporate), 15 styles total, reaction highlighting with gradients, pack selection changes sub-styles, generate button states, 8 credits pricing, first-free logic.
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing admin user for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reaction GIF feature fully tested. Single-screen flow working. All 6 style packs (classic, meme, pixar, anime, desi, corporate) with 15 total styles verified. First-free logic depends on user's reaction_gif_jobs count. Admin user has existing jobs so first_free=false. Generation uses Gemini 3 Pro (15-30 seconds).

accepts: all 15 style IDs including new viral packs

backend_first_free_logic.logic: first_free=true if user has 0 reaction_gif_jobs, else false
